meta.title: VELIFA — Web Performance Audit
meta.description: Analyze your e-commerce website performance in 30 seconds. Score, Core Web Vitals, detailed report.

hero.badge: Analysis in 30 seconds · Full report · 100% free
hero.title: Audit and optimize the
hero.subtitle: Get your complete performance score, Core Web Vitals, and a prioritized action plan. No technical knowledge required.
hero.cachedDesc: A report already exists (less than 24h). What would you like to do?
hero.rateLimitTitle: You have used your free audits for today
hero.rateLimitDesc: The free plan is limited to 3 audits per 24h. Go Pro for unlimited audits, full history and advanced reports.

performanceScore.title: Complete Performance Score
performanceScore.detail: Velifa analyzes your complete performance score: loading speed, visual stability, interactivity. Each metric is explained clearly with concrete improvement suggestions.

coreWebVitals.title: Core Web Vitals Measured
coreWebVitals.description: LCP, CLS, FID — Google's essential metrics
coreWebVitals.detail: We measure the 3 Core Web Vitals required by Google: LCP (loading), CLS (visual stability), TBT/FID (interactivity). These metrics directly impact your SEO ranking.

emailReport.title: Email Report
emailReport.description: Detailed PDF report in your inbox
emailReport.detail: Receive a complete report by email with all your scores, identified issues, and a prioritized list of improvements. Shareable with your development team.

screenshot.title: Integrated Screenshot
screenshot.detail: Each analysis includes an automatic screenshot of your site as seen by Google robots. Identify visual issues and track your site's appearance over time.

keyFeatures.sectionTitle: A complete audit, step by step
keyFeatures.sectionSubtitle: Velifa gives you all the metrics you need to understand and improve your website performance.

detailedScore.title: Detailed Score
detailedScore.desc: Performance, SEO, accessibility and best practices

emailReport.title: Email Report
emailReport.desc: Receive your complete report directly by email

whatsapp.desc: Personalized support to understand and improve your results

dataProtected.title: Protected Data
dataProtected.desc: Your data is never resold or shared with third parties

step1.title: Enter the URL
step1.desc: Enter the address of the site to analyze — home page, product page, or any public URL.

step2.title: Velifa Analysis
step2.desc: Velifa runs the tests with Google Lighthouse and collects all performance metrics.

step3.desc: Receive a complete report with your scores, visual screenshots and improvement recommendations.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Velifa and how performance audits work.
faq.a1: A web performance audit tool that analyzes your site and gives you detailed scores and recommendations.
faq.a2: Yes, a one-time URL audit is free. Pro and Business plans add time-tracking and other features.
faq.a3: You enter your site URL, Velifa runs a full analysis (mobile and desktop) and returns scores, Core Web Vitals, and a screenshot.
faq.a4: Performance, Accessibility, SEO, Best Practices, as well as Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, TBT, FCP).
faq.q5: Will I receive my report by email?
faq.a5: Yes, a report is sent to the email address provided during analysis, with detailed scores and main recommendations.
faq.a6: Velifa only collects the information strictly necessary for the analysis and report delivery. No secondary use is made of your data.
faq.q7: How long does an audit take?
faq.a7: Most audits are completed in under a minute. The exact time depends on the size and complexity of the analyzed site.
faq.a8: Yes, any publicly accessible site on the internet can be analyzed. You do not need to be the site owner.
faq.q9: What is the difference between plans?
faq.a9_mid: plan allows a one-time audit per URL. The
faq.a9_proDesc: plan adds a personal account with audit history and score trend tracking.
faq.a9_businessDesc: plan includes multiple sites, scheduled automatic audits, PDF export and API access.
faq.ctaDesc: Feel free to contact us — we usually respond within a few hours.
faq.footerNote: Velifa performs performance audits. Scores are calculated using a recognized methodology.

featurePage.title: Everything you need for faster sites
featurePage.subtitle: Velifa gives you all the keys to understand, measure and improve your website performance.
featurePage.f1Desc: 4 key scores — Performance, Accessibility, SEO, Best Practices — calculated by Velifa.
featurePage.f2Desc: LCP, CLS, TBT, FCP measured and explained with color coding (good/average/poor).
featurePage.f3Desc: Visual preview of the analyzed page to better understand the results.
featurePage.f4Desc: Detailed results sent directly to your inbox after each audit.
featurePage.f5Desc: History of all your audits and score evolution to measure your progress.
featurePage.f6Desc: Recurring automatic analyses to monitor your performance continuously.
featurePage.f7Desc: Manage multiple projects and websites from a single dashboard.
featurePage.f8Desc: Generate complete PDF reports to share your results with your teams or clients.
featurePage.f9Desc: Integrate Velifa into your workflows with full API access and documentation.
featurePage.step1Desc: Enter the address of the site you want to analyze. No registration required for the free plan.
featurePage.step2Desc: In a few seconds, Velifa collects the data and generates your complete report.
featurePage.step3Desc: Your report arrives by email. Apply the recommendations to improve your scores and user experience.
featurePage.ctaSubtitle: Launch your first free audit in a few seconds. No account required.
featurePage.footerNote: Velifa performs performance audits. Scores are calculated using a recognized methodology.

about.title: Web performance for everyone
about.subtitle: Velifa makes performance auditing accessible, clear and actionable. We believe every site deserves to be fast.
about.missionDesc: A website's performance should not be a domain reserved for technical experts. Yet it determines the experience of every visitor and the success of every online project. Velifa exists to change that — by offering a simple, transparent and truly useful audit tool, accessible to everyone who wants to build faster websites.
about.why1Title: A slow site drives visitors away
about.why1Desc: A few extra seconds of loading time is enough to lose a significant portion of your visitors. Performance is a key factor in retention.
about.why2Desc: Google integrates page performance into its ranking criteria. A fast site has a significant advantage in terms of visibility.
about.why3Title: Core Web Vitals are official criteria
about.why3Desc: Google uses LCP, CLS and TBT to evaluate user experience. These metrics play a direct role in the ranking of your pages.
about.val1Desc: No need to be an expert to understand your scores. Velifa translates technical data into clear, actionable information.
about.val2Desc: Audits are performed using recognized technology. Results are reproducible and verifiable.
about.val3Desc: Every recommendation is actionable. Velifa helps you move from analysis to real improvement of your performance.
about.ctaSubtitle: Launch your first free audit in a few seconds. No account required.
about.footerNote: Velifa performs performance audits. Scores are calculated using a recognized methodology.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.noticeText: Information marked with [brackets] are placeholders to be completed before publication.
privacy.s2Item1: provided by the user when submitting an audit, to receive the performance report.
privacy.s2Item2: the address of the website submitted for audit.
privacy.s2Item3: performance scores, Core Web Vitals, screenshots and recommendations generated by Velifa.
privacy.s2Item4: limited technical logs (IP address, user-agent, timestamps) used solely for service operation.
privacy.s3Intro: The collected data is used exclusively for:
privacy.s3Item1: Performing the performance audit requested by the user.
privacy.s3Item2: Sending the performance report to the provided email address.
privacy.s3Item3: Storing audit results for Pro/Business accounts (history and tracking).
privacy.s3Footer: No data is used for marketing or commercial prospecting purposes.
privacy.s4Content: Data processing is based on the performance of the contract requested by the user (performance audit and report delivery). The user's explicit consent is collected when submitting the audit.
privacy.s5Intro: Velifa uses the following third-party services:
privacy.s5Item2: used for sending reports by email.
privacy.s5Item3: Host name — to be completed, e.g. Vercel
privacy.s6Content: Audit data is retained for a period of [duration in months/years — to be completed]. Pro/Business account data is retained while the account is active. Technical logs are retained for [duration — to be completed]. After this period, data is deleted or anonymized.
privacy.s7Item1: With service providers strictly necessary for Velifa's operation (hosting, email), bound by confidentiality agreements.
privacy.s7Item2: If required by law, in response to legal proceedings or a request from competent authorities.
privacy.s7Footer: Velifa never sells or rents your personal data.
privacy.s8Intro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
privacy.s8Right1: obtain a copy of your personal data.
privacy.s8Right2: correct any inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacy.s8Right3: request deletion of your data (within legal retention obligations).
privacy.s8Right4: receive your data in a structured, readable format.
privacy.s8Right5: object to data processing on legitimate grounds.
privacy.s8Footer: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at: [email address — to be completed].
privacy.s9Content: Velifa implements appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, modification, disclosure or destruction. This includes encryption of communications (HTTPS), restricted data access, and regular monitoring of security practices.
privacy.s10Content: The Velifa site uses strictly necessary cookies for service operation. No tracking or marketing cookies are used without your explicit consent. For more details, see our cookie policy.
privacy.s11Content: This privacy policy may be updated periodically. The last update date is indicated at the top of this page. We encourage you to check it regularly.
privacy.s12Content: For any questions regarding this privacy policy or the processing of your personal data, contact us at:
